aboutSection.title: About me
aboutSection.description:
I am a Junior Technology Analyst, with experience in transitioning from the Sales Administration area to Software Engineering. I mainly work with front-end development, as well as maintaining systems in Python, prototyping in Figma and providing support in GCP environments.

I have an analytical, organized profile and a talent for handling different demands and stakeholders. During my onboarding, I developed a complete web application, consolidating my autonomy and quick learning ability.

Currently, I am specializing as a Full Stack Java Developer, focusing on scalable and well-structured systems.
